project.name: Ed & Sy Digital Agency Website
project.description: Marketing site (ednsy.com positioning): services, SEO pages, case studies, blog, contact

master.name: master
master.description: Legacy tag; use digital-agency for current tasks

digital-agency.name: digital-agency
digital-agency.description: Public marketing site in apps/landing (SvelteKit 5, Tailwind v4)

digital-agency.title: Strategic Planning & Brand Foundation
digital-agency.description: Establish digital agency positioning, messaging framework, and brand identity aligned with time-savings value proposition
digital-agency.details: Shipped in ongoing site copy and shared design tokens. Core messaging and personas reflected across homepage and service pages. Brand guidelines continue to evolve; surveys/A/B tests remain optional follow-ups.
digital-agency.testStrategy: Visual and copy consistency across key routes; stakeholder review

digital-agency.title: Content Strategy & Copywriting
digital-agency.description: Develop compelling copy for all website pages focusing on time-savings benefits and business results
digital-agency.details: Homepage, services, about, process, team, contact, industries, case studies, blog posts, and local SEO landing pages under src/routes. Content modules live under $lib/content where applicable.
digital-agency.testStrategy: Route-by-route review; SEO metadata present on major pages

digital-agency.title: Website Design & Visual Identity
digital-agency.description: Create modern, professional website design that emphasizes time-savings and digital transformation
digital-agency.details: Mobile-first layouts, shared UI primitives (bits-ui / Tailwind), typography and spacing consistent across apps/landing. Performance and a11y: iterate with Lighthouse as needed.
digital-agency.testStrategy: Responsive breakpoints; load and accessibility spot checks

digital-agency.title: Homepage Development
digital-agency.description: Build conversion-optimized homepage with time-savings messaging and clear service positioning
digital-agency.details: Implemented at src/routes/+page.svelte with hero, services overview, social proof, and CTAs to contact and deeper pages.
digital-agency.testStrategy: Manual pass on production build; contact links work

digital-agency.title: Voice AI Assistants Service Page
digital-agency.description: Develop flagship service page for Voice AI Assistants with detailed use cases and pricing
digital-agency.details: Implemented at /voice-ai-for-business with structured sections, FAQ, and JSON-LD (breadcrumb, service, FAQ schemas). Related Toronto/GTA SEO routes exist alongside.
digital-agency.testStrategy: Page renders; schema validates in Rich Results test
